description: Beyond the Veil Patch 10 (19 June 2023) — Hideout Energy and Power Changes, Crystal Arena/League Changes, Single-Server Changes, Knightfall Abbey Rewards Adjustments, Combat Balance Changes (Arcane Staffs, Bows, Daggers, Fire Staffs, Holy Staffs, Maces, Nature Staffs, Spears, Swords, War Gloves, Shoes, Capes), Fixes.

sections.heading: Hideout Energy and Power Changes
items: If a guild owns a territory in the same zone as their Hideout, that Hideout's Energy depletion rate is reduced: Level 0-3: -12.5%; Level 4: -14.2%; Level 5: -16.6%; Level 6: -20%; Level 7: -25%; Level 8: -33.3%; Level 9: -50%. Roads Hideouts cannot gain the Territory Bonus.
Increased HQ Hideout Power Bonus from 50% to 100%
Increased HQ Hideout Energy Penalty from 35% to 51%
Increased Energy drain rate for Hideouts at medium-to-high levels: Level 4: +16.6%; Level 5: +20%; Level 6: +25%; Level 7: +33.3%; Level 8: +50%; Level 9: +100%
Decreased Energy granted by Outlands Hideout Power Cores from 100% to 75%
sections.searchable_text: Hideout Energy Power Territory Bonus depletion rate Level 0-9 Roads Hideouts HQ Power Bonus 50% 100% Energy Penalty 35% 51% drain rate Power Cores 100% 75%

sections.heading: Crystal Arena and League Changes
sections.searchable_text: Crystal Arena League Rank Point formula 5v5 map Spade Cross Scoring Round 150s 120s 1 Runestone 25 20 2 Runestones 35 30 3 Runestones 50 40

subsections.heading: 5v5 Crystal League and Crystal Arena
subsections.searchable_text: 5v5 Crystal League Crystal Arena map Spade Cross Scoring Round 150s 120s 1 Runestone advantage 25 20 2 Runestones 35 30 3 Runestones 50 40

changes.ability: 5v5 Crystal League / Crystal Arena Map and Scoring:
changes.raw_text: Map changed: Spade → Cross. Scoring Round: 150s → 120s. 1 Runestone advantage: 25 → 20; 2 Runestones: 35 → 30; 3 Runestones: 50 → 40.
notes: Map changed from Spade to Cross for this season

sections.heading: Single-Server Changes
items: Albion East: All Castle and Castle Outpost Treasure spawn times moved 30 minutes earlier; Updated Guild Logos on Beta Season Winner Statues in open world
Albion West: Season 18 West Statues are now placeable furniture items
sections.searchable_text: Albion East Castle Outpost Treasure spawn times 30 minutes Guild Logos Beta Season statues Albion West Season 18 placeable furniture

sections.heading: Knightfall Abbey Rewards Adjustments
sections.description: Silver from mobs significantly reduced; Silver from loot chests found in Statues and protected by bosses increased. Brings mob values in line with other dungeons while increasing affected chest loot by ~22.2%. Coffer and Treasure Chest values unaffected.
sections.searchable_text: Knightfall Abbey Rewards Silver mobs reduced loot chests Statues bosses 22.2% Coffers Treasure Chests

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Time Freeze Great Arcane Player Immunity 5s 11s Void Malevolent Locus Cleanse CC debuffs instantly

changes.raw_text: Time Freeze: Immunity to another Time Freeze vs Players: 5s → 11s

stats.name: Player Immunity to another Time Freeze

changes.raw_text: The Void: Reworked Cleanse logic inside the area; CC effects and debuffs are now instantly removed when applied (preventing micro-stuns inside the area)
notes: Reworked Cleanse logic: CC effects and debuffs are now instantly removed when applied inside the area (prevents micro-stuns)
Ground-area CC effects like Sacred Ground still hit inside the area

changes.raw_text: Demon Arrow: Damage keeps increasing when multiple targets are hit at the same time.
notes: Damage keeps increasing when multiple targets are hit at the same time

subsections.heading: Capes
subsections.searchable_text: Capes Fey Barrier Brecilien Cape purge immune shield debuff immunity removed Sandstorm Bridgewatch Cape Slow Strength 20% 40% Force Pulse Avalonian Cape Cooldown 37s 26.5s 30s all IP

changes.raw_text: Fey Barrier: Caster is immune to purges while the shield is active. Debuff removal and debuff immunity removed.
notes: Caster is now immune to purges while the shield is active
Debuff removal and debuff immunity removed

changes.raw_text: Sandstorm: Slow Strength: 20% → 40%
Force Pulse: Cooldown: 37s (700 IP), 26.5s (1400 IP) → 30s (across all IP)
notes: Fixed bug where cooldown scaled with Item Power; now always 30s

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed issue where zone map could not be closed by clicking outside
Fixed issue where interacting with Island Merchant with Social UI open caused overlap
Fixed issues with Guild Season Rankings search and window becoming stuck on logout
Fixed issue where emptied Coffers still showed on minimap
Added error message when attempting to execute players while in Hostile Dismount state
Fixed issue where Ethereal Form (Feyscale Sandals) reduced its channel time when hit
Ethereal Path (Harvester Workboots): Removed incorrect lingering invisibility text; revealing invisibility no longer interrupts dash or removes forced movement immunity
Fixed issue where Invaders could lose the Corrupted Dungeon Debuff by downing themselves before invading
Improving quality of Brecilien Owl mounts no longer increases the negative carry weight effect
Improved behavior of WASD movement: any new movement keypress while channeling will cancel the channel
Fixed issue where Brecilien could not be selected as a destination at the Travel Planner when Home was set to a Mists Island
Fixed issue where downing yourself with Bloodthirsty Blade (Dagger) would expel you from the Mists
Fixed issue where chests in Castles and Outposts would display incorrect rarity
Fixed issue where reflecting damage could put a player into an active combat state
[Controller] Fixed issue where fishing would cancel on bite
Additional graphical, audio, UI, terrain, and localization fixes
